sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52237" key="kakomaqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-μᾰθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n52237.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bad at learning</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
